title: polygala deflorata
intro: Polygala deflorata, also known as Yin Chiao or Polygala root, is a plant species used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is believed to possess medicinal properties that aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Polygala deflorata include improved immune function, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from respiratory issues. Polygala deflorata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, making it a versatile addition to various traditional medicine practices.
